title: Replicate and stress-test Lab 31 auto-label audit
research_question: Do generated feature labels still predict held-out activation tests after confusable and too-broad controls?
model: gpt2 smoke or course base model
measurement_sites: feature-label test suite and evidence matrix
primary_metric: mean held-out AUC over best confound/control posture
stopping_rule: Run the preregistered suite once; one repair run may only add a missing control or fix instrumentation.
allowed_claim: An explanation method predicted held-out feature tests under named controls on this suite.
forbidden_claim: The automated label is the feature's meaning.

title: Surface-cue limits in toy tool-use decoding
research_question: Does a prompt-boundary tool-needed signal beat no-tool surface-cue controls in the toy tool harness?
model: gpt2 smoke or small instruct model
measurement_sites: prompt-boundary residual stream and constrained tool-choice prompt
primary_metric: tool-needed AUC and tool-selection accuracy over surface-control accuracy
controls: tool name mentioned but no tool needed
stopping_rule: Freeze the task JSONL and probe depths before reading results; one repair run may rebalance controls only if logged.
allowed_claim: A prompt-boundary signal predicted toy tool-needed labels above specified surface controls.
forbidden_claim: The model has a persistent goal or autonomous plan.

title: OCR and background leak audit for multimodal smoke runs
research_question: Which multimodal claims fail when OCR and background shortcuts are made explicit?
model: synthetic connector or real VLM extension
measurement_sites: vision, connector, language, and text-control states
primary_metric: OCR/background leak gate status and connector patch recovery over random/wrong-region controls
stopping_rule: Treat synthetic connector output as smoke only; real VLM claims require a separate frozen hook-validation run.
allowed_claim: The package identifies OCR/background/alignment gates required before a real VLM claim.
forbidden_claim: The VLM has a human-like visual concept of color.

title: Preference direction versus length and agreement confounds
research_question: Does a preference proxy or residual direction beat length, agreement, sentiment, hedging, and refusal controls?
model: gpt2 smoke or course instruct model
measurement_sites: paired-response log-prob proxy, residual direction, and A/B preference prompt
primary_metric: preference signal AUC over best shortcut-control AUC
stopping_rule: Freeze pair order and shortcut features before scoring; one repair run may add missing no-tool or anti-sycophancy controls.
allowed_claim: A measured preference signal separated preferred pairs under named shortcut controls.
forbidden_claim: The reward model understands human values.
